headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays secured a thrilling 2-1 victory over the Detroit Tigers, led by Yohendrick Piñango's 2-hit, 1-home run performance. In other action, the St. Louis Cardinals edged out the Kansas City Royals 4-2, while the Colorado Rockies took down the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-2. The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles 13-3, with Keibert Ruiz leading the charge.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Heliot Ramos, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list by the San Francisco Giants due to a right quad strain. Other notable injuries include Ben Joyce (Los Angeles Angels), Trevor Story (Boston Red Sox), Clay Holmes (New York Mets), Max Fried (New York Yankees), Matt Strahm (Kansas City Royals), Matt Waldron (San Diego Padres), and Blake Snell (Los Angeles Dodgers).

The Chicago White Sox made a notable trade, acquiring center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The Athletics also traded right-handed pitcher Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for second baseman Alika Williams and traded right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Take Down Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays edged out the Detroit Tigers 2-1, securing their win behind a strong performance from their lineup. Yohendrick Piñango led the charge with a 2-hit, 1-home run game, driving in 1 run.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings pitched. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 4-2 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela securing the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks with 2 RBI, while Eduardo Rodriguez pitched 5.1 innings with 6 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a 13-3 victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run, 5-RBI performance.

top_news.title: **Giants Place Heliot Ramos on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Francisco Giants left fielder Heliot Ramos has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right quad strain. The injury occurred on May 16, 2026.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The trade was completed on May 16, 2026.
